EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE ROADMAP

EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE students need practical, industry-relevant skills that connect classroom knowledge to internships, projects, professional practice, and global career opportunities.

EXERCISE PRESCRIPTION

EXERCISE PRESCRIPTION is a practical skill that helps EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE students prepare for real professional work.

FITNESS TESTING

FITNESS TESTING is a practical skill that helps EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE students prepare for real professional work.

HEALTH COACHING

HEALTH COACHING is a practical skill that helps EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE students prepare for real professional work.

SPORTS NUTRITION

SPORTS NUTRITION is a practical skill that helps EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE students prepare for real professional work.

BEHAVIOR CHANGE

BEHAVIOR CHANGE is a practical skill that helps EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE students prepare for real professional work.

DATA ANALYSIS

DATA ANALYSIS is a practical skill that helps EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE students prepare for real professional work.

INJURY PREVENTION

INJURY PREVENTION is a practical skill that helps EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE students prepare for real professional work.

COMMUNITY HEALTH

COMMUNITY HEALTH is a practical skill that helps EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE students prepare for real professional work.

RESEARCH METHODS

RESEARCH METHODS is a practical skill that helps EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE students prepare for real professional work.

CLIENT COMMUNICATION

CLIENT COMMUNICATION is a practical skill that helps EXERCISE AND HEALTH SCIENCE students prepare for real professional work.

WHY THESE SKILLS MATTER

PROFESSIONAL READINESS

These skills help students move from theory to practical work.

EMPLOYER DEMAND

Employers value graduates who can use tools, solve problems, and communicate results.

CAREER GROWTH

Building these skills early creates stronger opportunities for internships, projects, and jobs.
